## Canonical Foundry-Style Surface (v2)

This repository treats `/api/v2/*` as the Foundry-aligned public surface.
`/api/v1/*` is considered internal/legacy unless explicitly required for product flows.

### BFF v2 domains

| Domain | Ops |

| `ontologies` | 48 |
| `connectivity` | 31 |
| `datasets` | 19 |
| `orchestration` | 11 |

## v1 Surfaces That Overlap Foundry Domains (Candidates for Deprecation)

They are the first places to look when removing legacy / duplicate surfaces.

## Notes / Next Steps

- For the full BFF endpoint catalog (v1+v2), see `docs/API_REFERENCE.md`.
- `docs/FOUNDRY_V1_TO_V2_MIGRATION.md` documents removed v1 compat routes and the Foundry v2 doc baseline.
- When removing v1 routes, migrate *call sites first* (frontend + internal clients), then delete handlers and add OpenAPI guards.
